title: await workbook.xlsx.writeFile(filePath); using xlsx.writeFile function excel file update successfully but file size not changed it shows default file size,when we saved file manually then file size got changed
author: autotest-web
body:
## 💬 Questions and Help

Please do not use issues for making a questions, for this purposes much better is GitHub Discussions feature:
https://github.com/exceljs/exceljs/discussions/categories/q-a

### How to make a question?

1. First, try to find it by using search bar - anware what are you looking for was be done before.
2. Push the `New discussion` button.
3. Select `Q&A` category.

comments.author: zurmokeeper
comments.body: @autotest-web Can you post the code and the excel file before and after the operation?

comments.author: autotest-web
